                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.0.0-M7</version>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>
EOF

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 
                             http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.ploy.test</groupId>
    <artifactId>ploy-orw-java11-maven</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>Ploy OpenRewrite Java 11 Maven Test</name>
    <description>Test Java 11 project for OpenRewrite migration testing</description>

    <properties>
        <maven.compiler.source>11</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>11</maven.compiler.target>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <junit.version>5.9.3</junit.version>
        <commons-lang3.version>3.12.0</commons-lang3.version>
        <slf4j.version>1.7.36</slf4j.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Common utilities with known migration patterns -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
            <version>${commons-lang3.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        
        <!-- Logging framework -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
            <version>${slf4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-simple</artifactId>
            <version>${slf4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit-jupiter-engine</artifactId>
            <version>${junit.version}</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.junit.jupiter</groupId>
            <artifactId>junit-jupiter-api</artifactId>
            <version>${junit.version}</version>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>11</source>
                    <target>11</target>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.1.2</version>
            </plugin>
            
            <!-- OpenRewrite Maven Plugin for automated refactoring -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.openrewrite.maven</groupId>
                <artifactId>rewrite-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>5.3.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <activeRecipes>
                        <recipe>org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java8toJava11</recipe>
                        <recipe>org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.CommonStaticAnalysis</recipe>
                        <recipe>org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports</recipe>
                    </activeRecipes>
                </configuration>
                <dependencies>
                    <dependency>
                        <groupId>org.openrewrite.recipe</groupId>
                        <artifactId>rewrite-migrate-java</artifactId>
                        <version>2.0.7</version>
                    </dependency>
                </dependencies>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>
</project>

input.content:
# Ploy OpenRewrite Java 11 Maven Test Repository

This is a test repository for OpenRewrite migration testing, specifically for Java 11 to Java 17 migrations using the Ploy transflow system.

## Purpose

This repository contains Java 11 code patterns that can be detected and transformed by OpenRewrite recipes:

- **String operations** using Apache Commons Lang that can be replaced with native Java 17+ methods
- **Optional usage patterns** that can be simplified with newer Java features
- **File operations** using older Java APIs
- **Stream operations** that can benefit from newer Java patterns
- **Collection handling** that can be modernized

## Project Structure

```
src/main/java/com/ploy/test/
├── App.java              # Main application with migration patterns
src/test/java/com/ploy/test/
├── AppTest.java           # Test class with testable patterns
```

## Building and Testing

```bash
# Compile the project
mvn compile

# Run tests
mvn test

# Run OpenRewrite analysis (dry-run)
mvn rewrite:dryRun

# Apply OpenRewrite transformations
mvn rewrite:run
```

## OpenRewrite Recipes

The project is configured with these OpenRewrite recipes in `pom.xml`:

- `org.openrewrite.java.migrate.Java8toJava11` - Java 8 to 11 migration patterns
- `org.openrewrite.java.cleanup.CommonStaticAnalysis` - General code cleanup
- `org.openrewrite.java.RemoveUnusedImports` - Remove unused imports

## Usage in Ploy Transflow

This repository is used by the Ploy transflow system for testing:
- Self-healing workflow validation
- GitLab MR integration testing  
- Build validation with real repository URLs
- OpenRewrite recipe execution testing

The repository provides a realistic codebase for testing Java migration scenarios without requiring complex external dependencies.

content.content:
the `--remote` option can only be used with `--source`

Usage:  gh repo create [<name>] [flags]

Flags:
      --add-readme             Add a README file to the new repository
  -c, --clone                  Clone the new repository to the current directory
  -d, --description string     Description of the repository
      --disable-issues         Disable issues in the new repository
      --disable-wiki           Disable wiki in the new repository
  -g, --gitignore string       Specify a gitignore template for the repository
  -h, --homepage URL           Repository home page URL
      --include-all-branches   Include all branches from template repository
      --internal               Make the new repository internal
  -l, --license string         Specify an Open Source License for the repository
      --private                Make the new repository private
      --public                 Make the new repository public
      --push                   Push local commits to the new repository
  -r, --remote string          Specify remote name for the new repository
  -s, --source string          Specify path to local repository to use as source
  -t, --team name              The name of the organization team to be granted access
  -p, --template repository    Make the new repository based on a template repository

source ~/.zshrc && curl -X POST "${GITLAB_URL}/api/v4/projects" \

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "ploy-orw-java11-maven",
    "description": "Test Java 11 Maven repository for OpenRewrite migration testing with Ploy transflow",
    "visibility": "public",
    "initialize_with_readme": false
  }'
